# VeilPix - AI Image and Video Generator

## Overview
VeilPix is a free, privacy-focused AI image and video generator for photo editing, text-to-image creation, text-to-video generation, image-to-video animation, and reference-to-video workflows.

## Key Facts
- Free tier: 30 credits after sign-up
- AI image models: Nano Banana 2, Seedream 5 Lite/Pro, Wan 2.7 Image
- AI video models: Wan 2.7 text-to-video and reference-to-video, Wan 2.6 Flash image-to-video
- Video model support: Seedance 2.0
- Privacy: Browser-local creative history, no public gallery, and AI requests proxied through VeilPix; provider retention applies
- Formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC (auto-converted), plus common video references such as MP4, WebM, and MOV
- No watermarks on output

## Features
1. AI Photo Editing - Retouch images, remove objects, change colors, and adjust lighting
2. Text-to-Image - Generate new images from natural language prompts
3. Multi-image Composition - Combine reference images into new outputs
4. Text-to-Video - Create Wan 2.7 videos from written prompts
5. Image-to-Video - Animate still images with Wan 2.6 Flash
6. Reference-to-Video - Use images, videos, or both as creative guidance
7. Seedance 2.0 - Planned future video generation support
8. Privacy-Focused Workflow - Creation history stays in the browser instead of a persistent VeilPix server-side library

## Age-Verified After Dark
VeilPix includes an age-verified 18+ mode for private NSFW and adult creative workflows where supported by the selected model provider. VeilPix still applies account controls, provider safety systems, and misuse prevention.

## AI Models
- Nano Banana 2: Gemini-powered fast image editing and generation
- Seedream 5 Lite/Pro: ByteDance models for fast or higher-quality image generation
- Wan 2.7 Image: Image generation and editing model for prompt and reference workflows
- Wan 2.7 Image: Image generation and editing workflows
- Wan 2.7 Video: Text-to-video and reference-to-video workflows
- Wan 2.6 Flash: Image-to-video generation
- Seedance 2.0: Planned future video generation support

## Pricing
- Free: 30 credits on sign-up
- Credits: $0.10 per credit
- No subscription required

## Use Cases
- Photo retouching and enhancement
- Object removal and addition
- Artistic filters and style transfer
- Color correction and lighting adjustment
- Image composition and blending
- Text-to-video clips for social, concept, and creative production
- Image-to-video animation from still images
- Reference-to-video generation using image and video inputs

Website: https://veilstudio.io/veilpix/
Blog: https://veilstudio.io/veilpix/blog/
Privacy: https://veilstudio.io/veilpix/privacy/
